description: Optional stop-time review gate for Codex Companion.

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && "$(command -v node || command -v nodejs || ls /opt/homebrew/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || echo node)" scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs SessionStart

cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && "$(command -v node || command -v nodejs || ls /opt/homebrew/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || echo node)" scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs SessionEnd
cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && "$(command -v node || command -v nodejs || ls /opt/homebrew/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || echo node)" scripts/stop-review-gate-hook.mjs
